case_title: TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION VS. STRUCTURED DATA SYSTEMS,INC. et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF ERNEST I. KNOWLES RE: CCP 585(D) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT STRUCTURED DATA SYSTEMS,INC. DOES 1 TO 10,INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-12-2004 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-12-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-26-2004
DECLARATION OF LAUDEL VILLANUEVA RE: EQUIPMENT VALUATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION

CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STRUCTURED DATA SYSTEMS,INC. POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: SEE TEXT, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $6,690.92 DAMAGES, $1,000.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $185.30 COSTS, $42.09 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,918.31, PROPERTY VALUE-$3,000.00; EXHIBIT 1 FOR DESCRIPTION OF EQUIPMENT; (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT & JUDGMENT AT LENGTH).
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAR-12-2004, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OR JUDGMENT ON FILE AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS
DECLARATION OF ANSON LOUIE RE: EVID CODE 1521, 1550 FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION SERVED NOV-19-2003, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT STRUCTURED DATA SYSTEMS,INC.
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $185.30 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT STRUCTURED DATA SYSTEMS,INC.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10,INCLUSIVE
